auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Create and manage your standard operating procedures
dashboard.noSopsDesc: Create your first SOP by uploading a video or recording a procedure live.
dashboard.proTipDesc: For best AI analysis, ensure good lighting and steady camera work. Close-up shots of hands and tools help the AI identify steps more accurately.
dashboard.feature1: Extracts key frames from video automatically
dashboard.feature2: Identifies safety hazards and PPE requirements
dashboard.feature3: Detects tools and materials in each step

generator.chooseSource: Choose how to create your SOP
generator.liveDesc: Record with your camera in real-time

generator.youtubeUrlDesc: Create SOP from a YouTube video

generator.titlePlaceholder: e.g. How to change brake pads

generator.sopCreatedDesc: Your SOP has been generated successfully.
generator.sopSubtitle: Turn any video into step-by-step instructions with AI.
generator.upgradeToProDesc: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited SOPs, PDF export and more.
generator.startCameraDesc: Film yourself or your work with camera
generator.startScreenDesc: Record your screen for software tutorials
generator.addEquipment: Add equipment manuals or specific safety instructions...
generator.feedbackDesc: Something not working? Missing a feature? We'd love to hear from you!
generator.readyToAnalyzeDesc: We'll extract key frames and generate step-by-step instructions
generator.tipReviewSteps: Review that all steps are correct
generator.sopReady: Your SOP is ready. Review and refine it for best results.

library.title: SOP Library
library.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this SOP?
library.editModeDesc: Make changes to your SOP. Don't forget to save when done!
library.addImageDesc: Upload an image and apply to any step
library.clickTimestamp: Click on step timestamps to jump to that moment
library.actionsDesc: Edit, export and distribute this procedure.
library.upgradeUnlock: Upgrade to Pro to unlock all steps, PDF export, and editing.
library.emptyLibraryDesc: Capture or import content to build your knowledge base.
library.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

live.recordWithoutPlan: or just record without a plan →
live.howToRecord: How do you want to record?
live.screenRecordingDesc: Click below to choose which screen or window to share
live.showOnCamera: Show this on camera. Press "Done" when finished.
live.navigateFirstPageDesc: Go to the screen you want to capture, then come back and click the button below
live.navigateNextPageDesc: Switch to the next screen, then click capture — or finish if you're done
live.captureAtLeast: Capture at least 2 steps to generate SOP
live.selectFramesDesc: Click to deselect frames you don't want. Each selected frame = one step.

stepEditor.clickToReplace: Click to replace • Max 5MB • JPG, PNG, WebP
stepEditor.clickFrameToUse: Click on a frame to use it for this step • {{count}} frames available

subscription.startFreeDuringBeta: Start free during beta, upgrade when you need more.
subscription.enterCodeToUnlock: Enter your code to unlock special access
subscription.creatorPartnership: Creator with an audience? <1>Join our Creator Partnership</1> for free Pro access.
subscription.faq1Question: What do I get during beta?
subscription.faq1Answer: During beta, you get full access to all features including unlimited SOPs, YouTube import, live recording, PDF export, and frame selection - completely free!
subscription.faq2Answer: When beta ends, free users will have a limit on SOPs. Your existing SOPs will remain accessible. Pro subscription gives unlimited access.
subscription.faq3Answer: One SOP is a single video processed into a procedure document, regardless of length or number of steps.
subscription.faq4Answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe.
subscription.betaNotAvailable: The Pro plan is not available during beta. You already have access to all features!
subscription.paymentNotConfigured: Payment is not configured yet. Contact support.
subscription.invalidPromoCode: Invalid promo code. Please check and try again.
subscription.promoActivated: {{name}} activated! You have {{type}} access for {{days}} days.

common.paymentSuccess: Payment complete! You now have Pro access.
common.loginToSave: Sign in to save your SOPs
common.loginPromptDesc: Your SOPs are saved locally. Sign in with Google to sync across devices and never lose your work.

landing.betaBanner: Still building this thing. Free while I figure out what works.
landing.heroP1: Phone in one hand. Tool in the other. Talking through what you're doing.
landing.heroP2: Then the video just... sits there. You'll "write it up later."
landing.heroSubtext: Upload a video. A step-by-step guide is created automatically in minutes.
landing.whoItsFor: Built for service technicians, but works for anyone doing hands-on stuff.
landing.whoItsForSub: Work. Hobbies. Content creation. If you can film it, you can turn it into a guide.
landing.easyWay: The easy way: just record yourself
landing.easyWaySub: Open camera. Do the job. Talk through what you're doing. Done.
landing.justRecordYourselfDesc: Open your phone, hit record, and do the task as you normally would. No special setup needed.
landing.talkWhileYouWorkDesc: "Now I'm tightening this bolt..." - AI transcribes everything and turns it into professional instructions.
landing.aiDoesTheRestDesc: Scene detection captures the right moments. AI writes clear instructions. You get a complete SOP.
landing.aiStepPlannerDesc: Describe what you'll show and AI creates a step-by-step plan. Follow the guide while recording.
landing.howItWorksSub: Three ways to get your video in. Same result: a guide you can actually use.
landing.pricingSub: Free during beta. I'll figure out pricing when I know what this is worth to people.
landing.ctaTitle: Next time you film something, don't let it sit there.
landing.ctaSub: Upload it. Get a guide. Actually use it.
landing.youtubeImportDesc: Paste any YouTube URL. AI extracts frames and generates step-by-step instructions automatically.
landing.liveRecordingDesc: Record yourself doing the task with your phone. AI watches and creates the SOP as you work.
landing.screenRecordingDesc: Capture your screen step by step. Perfect for software tutorials, IT procedures, and digital workflows.
landing.videoUploadDesc: Upload existing training videos. AI analyzes the footage and extracts clear step-by-step instructions.
landing.safetyDetectionDesc: AI automatically identifies hazards and suggests PPE requirements from your footage.
landing.pdfExportDesc: One-click export to professional PDF ready for print or digital distribution.
landing.frameSelectionDesc: AI picks the best frames, or manually choose which images to use for each step.
landing.manufacturingExample: Machine setup, maintenance procedures, quality checks
landing.foodServiceExample: Health code compliance, recipes, cleaning procedures

creator.heroDesc: Your followers watch your videos once and forget. Give them something they can print, follow, and actually use. Paste a YouTube link or record live while you work.
creator.aiExtractsFrames: AI extracts key frames and generates step-by-step instructions
creator.nicheDesc: No matter what you create, your audience wants guides they can actually follow.
creator.fromYoutubeToGuide: From YouTube Video to Sellable Guide in 3 Steps
creator.step1Desc: Just copy your video URL. Works with any public YouTube video.
creator.step2Desc: Our AI watches your video, extracts key frames, and writes professional step-by-step instructions.
creator.step3Desc: Customize the guide, export as PDF, and sell on Gumroad, Patreon, or your own site.
creator.orRecordLive: Or Record Live While You Create
creator.orRecordLiveDesc: Don't have a polished YouTube video? No problem. Just open FrameOps on your phone, hit record, and do your thing. AI creates the SOP as you work.
creator.justFilmYourselfDesc: Open your phone, hit record, and do the task as you normally would.
creator.talkWhileYouWorkDesc: "Now I'm applying the second coat..." - AI transcribes and turns it into instructions.
creator.getCompleteSopDesc: Scene detection captures the right moments. You get a ready-to-sell guide.
creator.aiStepPlannerDesc: Describe what you'll show and AI creates a step-by-step plan. Follow the guide while you record.
creator.partnerWithUs: Partner With Us & Get Free Pro Forever
creator.partnerDesc: Mention FrameOps in your content and get permanent Pro access. We grow together - you get a free tool, we get exposure.
creator.alreadyHaveAudience: Already have an audience? Email us for instant Pro access.
creator.diyMakersDesc: Turn build videos into printable project guides with measurements, materials lists, and step-by-step photos.
creator.diyMakersExample: "Build this coffee table" → Complete woodworking SOP
creator.fitnessHealthDesc: Transform workout videos into structured training programs your clients can follow at the gym.
creator.cookingRecipesDesc: Convert cooking videos into professional recipe cards with exact ingredients and timings.
creator.beautyTutorialsDesc: Create detailed makeup guides your audience can reference while getting ready.
creator.techSetupDesc: Turn setup/installation videos into IT-style documentation your viewers can follow.
creator.gardeningHomeDesc: Create seasonal guides and project plans from your gardening or home improvement content.
creator.newRevenueStreamDesc: Sell SOPs on Gumroad, Patreon, or your own site. Your video is free, the guide is premium.
creator.deeperFanConnectionDesc: Give your audience something tangible. They'll actually DO what you teach, not just watch.
creator.zeroExtraWorkDesc: Just paste your YouTube link. AI extracts frames and creates the SOP automatically.
creator.passiveIncomeDesc: Create once, sell forever. Your old videos become evergreen products.

apiKeys.createFirstKeyDesc: Create your first API key to start using the API
apiKeys.copyKeyWarning: Copy your key now. You won't be able to see it again.
apiKeys.keyNameHelp: Give your key a name to help you remember what it's used for.
